description.unified: Leaps and deals Physical Damage to enemies within range, stunning them for [5 sec->1 sec].

Deals Physical Damage to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their Physical Defense by 30% and Attack Speed by [500->65%] for [20 sec->4 sec]. [ (removed) When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by 0.5 sec.]
For [20 sec->7 sec], increases all allies' Physical Defense, Physical [Crit Resistance->Block Chance] by [300->200], and reduces Physical Damage taken by [25%->35%].

On block, deals Physical Damage in front and reduces the target's Attack by [20%->10%] for [8 sec->5 sec]. [ (removed) recovers own Mana by 300. When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by 20% and P.Crit Resistance by 200 for 5 sec.] After using the skill, your Defense increases by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [2 sec->1 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: Increases [Physical] Damage taken by the target by [25%->30%] for [10 sec->4 sec].

dark.unified: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

dark.unified: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 400.

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect is changed to apply 2 stacks.

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, when an ally other than yourself is hit, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec.

description.unified: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 2 sec.
[Shield Strike] reduces the [ (added) P.DEF of hit enemies by 30% and their] P.Crit Resist by [500->{0}] for [10 sec->4 sec].
[Guardian Shield] increases effect duration by 4.5 sec and boosts DEF increase by {0}%.
[Vow of Knights] recovers [2%->6%] of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by {0} sec.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' [ATK->Max HP] by [15%->10%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 skills used, increases all allies' Physical Defense by {0}% and Attack by [ (added) {1}%] for 15 sec. The Physical Defense increase is applied at [ (added) 2] times its value to the [ (added) 4] allies with the lowest Physical Defense.
